product_name: Union Bank of India Home Loan
tagline: Union Home — Your Home, Your Dream

interest_rates.note: Linked to RLLR (Repo Linked Lending Rate)

tenure.note: Loan tenure + applicant's age must be ≤ 70

work_experience.self_employed: Minimum 3 years in the same business

eligibility.co_applicant: Adding spouse, parents, or children as co-applicant is encouraged — it increases eligibility

property_documents: Title deed / Chain of title documents

processing_fee.waiver: Waiver possible during special campaigns — confirm with the branch

special_schemes.name: Union Ashiyana Home Loan
special_schemes.benefit: Subsidy under PMAY (Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana)
special_schemes.subsidy_amount: Up to ₹2.67 Lakh (EWS), Up to ₹2.35 Lakh (LIG)

special_schemes.name: Union NRI Home Loan
special_schemes.benefit: Loan for property in India, EMI via NRE/NRO account

process_steps.title: Eligibility Check
process_steps.step_text_hindi: ग्राहक की आयु, आय, सिबिल स्कोर और रोजगार का प्रकार सत्यापित करें।
process_steps.detail: Verify the customer's age, income, CIBIL score, and employment type
process_steps.staff_action: Pull CIBIL score (with consent), calculate income eligibility

process_steps.title: Loan Amount Calculation
process_steps.step_text_hindi: अधिकतम पात्र ऋण की गणना करें। ग्राहक को विभिन्न अवधि विकल्प दिखाएँ।
process_steps.detail: Max eligible loan = 60x monthly net income (salaried). Calculate LTV ratio from property value
process_steps.staff_action: Use EMI calculator, show customer different tenure options

process_steps.title: Document Collection
process_steps.step_text_hindi: सभी आवश्यक दस्तावेज़ एकत्र करें। मूल दस्तावेज़ जाँचें और फ़ोटोकॉपी रखें।
process_steps.detail: Collect all listed documents — verify originals, keep photocopies
process_steps.staff_action: Print document checklist and give to customer

process_steps.title: Property Legal & Technical Verification
process_steps.step_text_hindi: बैंक के अधिकृत वकील से कानूनी राय और बैंक-अनुमोदित मूल्यांकक से संपत्ति का मूल्यांकन करवाएँ।
process_steps.detail: Legal opinion from bank-empanelled lawyer and property valuation from bank-approved valuer
process_steps.staff_action: Request legal opinion and valuation report

process_steps.title: Application Processing
process_steps.step_text_hindi: सभी दस्तावेज़ों के साथ शाखा या पोर्टल पर औपचारिक आवेदन जमा करें।
process_steps.detail: Submit formal application with all documents at branch or portal
process_steps.staff_action: Generate CIF number, create application file

process_steps.title: Sanction
process_steps.step_text_hindi: ऋण समिति से अनुमोदन के बाद स्वीकृति पत्र जारी किया जाएगा।
process_steps.detail: Approval from credit team, Sanction Letter will be issued
process_steps.staff_action: Explain the sanction letter to customer — terms & conditions

process_steps.title: Agreement & Registration
process_steps.step_text_hindi: ऋण अनुबंध पर हस्ताक्षर होंगे और संपत्ति बंधक पंजीकृत की जाएगी।
process_steps.detail: Loan agreement will be executed, property mortgage will be registered (MODT)
process_steps.staff_action: Guide on stamp duty payment, accompany for registration

process_steps.title: Loan Disbursement
process_steps.step_text_hindi: निर्माणाधीन संपत्ति के लिए किस्तों में और तैयार संपत्ति के लिए पूरी राशि सीधे विक्रेता को दी जाएगी।
process_steps.detail: Under-construction: tranche-wise disbursement. Ready property: full disbursement directly to seller/builder
process_steps.staff_action: Fill disbursement request form, confirm cheque/NEFT details

tax_benefits.section_80C: Deduction up to ₹1.5 Lakh on principal repayment
tax_benefits.section_24B: Deduction up to ₹2 Lakh on interest (self-occupied property)
tax_benefits.section_80EEA: First-time buyer: ₹1.5 Lakh extra interest deduction (affordable housing)
